message:
fix: handle nullable agent_id in JOIN-free lexical rebuild query

The original INNER JOIN silently excluded conversations with NULL
agent_id.  The new single-table query would error on NULL since
agent_id was parsed as i64.  Make it Option<i64> to match the schema
and degrade gracefully to "unknown" slug.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
